[01:21.86] 1773, he writes his first piano concerto
[01:27.30] 1782, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart marries Constance Weber
[01:32.75] 1784, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart becomes a free mason
[01:37.99] 1791, Mozart composes "The Magic Flute"
[01:43.37] On December 5th of that same year, Mozart dies
